metadata.description: Short unique customer/deployment name used as Azure resource name prefix, e.g. customer1-ziti.
Unique Azure public DNS label prefix for the deployment, e.g. customer1-ziti. Azure appends region.cloudapp.azure.com.
Base URL containing bootstrap scripts. Replace with your public GitHub raw repo URL or other artifact URL without trailing slash.
Optional SAS/query string for private artifact storage. Leave blank when deploying from public GitHub raw files.
Deploy Application Gateway WAF v2 and Let's Encrypt ACME automation for HA ZAC/API HTTPS.

Customer public DNS name for ZAC/API, e.g. ziti.customer.com. Final public access uses HTTPS 443 through Application Gateway. DNS can be updated after deployment; router enrollment bootstraps internally first.
Email for Let's Encrypt/ACME account registration
Use letsencrypt_test first to avoid production rate limits, then letsencrypt for real cert.
Key Vault name. If createKeyVault=true, this vault is created in the deployment resource group. If false, this must be an existing vault.
Existing Key Vault resource group. Leave empty when createKeyVault=true or when the vault is in this deployment resource group.
Optional Azure AD object ID to receive Key Vault Certificates Officer access. Leave empty to skip; avoids duplicate role-assignment failures across repeated test deployments.
Create a new Azure Key Vault in the deployment resource group. Set false to use an existing enterprise Key Vault.
LetsEncryptGoDaddy issues/imports a public certificate using GoDaddy DNS-01. ExistingKeyVaultCertificate skips ACME and uses an existing Key Vault certificate secret.
Optional GoDaddy API key. Required for certificateMode=LetsEncryptGoDaddy when creating/storing GoDaddy secrets automatically.
Optional GoDaddy API secret. Required for certificateMode=LetsEncryptGoDaddy when creating/storing GoDaddy secrets automatically.

protectedSettings.commandToExecute: [concat('set -e; SCRIPT="', variables('controllerPrimaryScriptName'), '"; curl -fsSL "', parameters('artifactBaseUrl'), '/', variables('controllerPrimaryScriptName'), variables('artifactQueryString'), '" -o "$SCRIPT"; chmod +x "$SCRIPT"; ', 'bash azure-bootstrap-ziti-ha-controller-primary-v4.sh ', parameters('adminUsername'), ' ', base64(parameters('adminPassword')), ' ', parameters('zitiAdminUser'), ' ', base64(parameters('zitiAdminPassword')), ' ', parameters('deploymentPrefix'), ' ', variables('controller01VmName'), ' ', variables('controller02VmName'), ' ', variables('controller03VmName'), ' ', variables('router01VmName'), ' ', variables('router02VmName'), ' ', variables('router03VmName'), ' ', variables('controller01Fqdn'), ' ', variables('controller02Fqdn'), ' ', variables('controller03Fqdn'), ' ', variables('router01Fqdn'), ' ', variables('router02Fqdn'), ' ', variables('router03Fqdn'), ' ', parameters('runAptUpgrade'), ' ', parameters('publicDnsName'))]

[concat('set -e; SCRIPT="', variables('controllerSecondaryScriptName'), '"; curl -fsSL "', parameters('artifactBaseUrl'), '/', variables('controllerSecondaryScriptName'), variables('artifactQueryString'), '" -o "$SCRIPT"; chmod +x "$SCRIPT"; ', 'bash azure-bootstrap-ziti-ha-controller-secondary-v4.sh ', variables('controller02VmName'), ' ', variables('controller02Fqdn'), ' ', parameters('runAptUpgrade'), ' ', parameters('publicDnsName'))]

[concat('set -e; SCRIPT="', variables('controllerSecondaryScriptName'), '"; curl -fsSL "', parameters('artifactBaseUrl'), '/', variables('controllerSecondaryScriptName'), variables('artifactQueryString'), '" -o "$SCRIPT"; chmod +x "$SCRIPT"; ', 'bash azure-bootstrap-ziti-ha-controller-secondary-v4.sh ', variables('controller03VmName'), ' ', variables('controller03Fqdn'), ' ', parameters('runAptUpgrade'), ' ', parameters('publicDnsName'))]

[concat('set -e; SCRIPT="', variables('routerScriptName'), '"; curl -fsSL "', parameters('artifactBaseUrl'), '/', variables('routerScriptName'), variables('artifactQueryString'), '" -o "$SCRIPT"; chmod +x "$SCRIPT"; ', 'bash azure-bootstrap-ziti-ha-router-v4.sh ', variables('router01VmName'), ' ', parameters('runAptUpgrade'))]

[concat('set -e; SCRIPT="', variables('routerScriptName'), '"; curl -fsSL "', parameters('artifactBaseUrl'), '/', variables('routerScriptName'), variables('artifactQueryString'), '" -o "$SCRIPT"; chmod +x "$SCRIPT"; ', 'bash azure-bootstrap-ziti-ha-router-v4.sh ', variables('router02VmName'), ' ', parameters('runAptUpgrade'))]

[concat('set -e; SCRIPT="', variables('routerScriptName'), '"; curl -fsSL "', parameters('artifactBaseUrl'), '/', variables('routerScriptName'), variables('artifactQueryString'), '" -o "$SCRIPT"; chmod +x "$SCRIPT"; ', 'bash azure-bootstrap-ziti-ha-router-v4.sh ', variables('router03VmName'), ' ', parameters('runAptUpgrade'))]

properties.scriptContent:
set -Eeuo pipefail
# AzureCLI deployment script containers may not include curl by default. Install required ACME tooling.
if ! command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  if command -v apk >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    apk add --no-cache curl openssl ca-certificates
  elif command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    apt-get update
    DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y curl openssl ca-certificates
  else
    echo "Neither apk nor apt-get found; cannot install curl" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
fi
if ! command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  if command -v apk >/dev/null 2>&1; then apk add --no-cache openssl; fi
fi
KV_NAME="${KV_NAME}"
DOMAIN="${DOMAIN}"
EMAIL="${EMAIL}"
CERT_NAME="${CERT_NAME}"
GD_KEY_SECRET="${GD_KEY_SECRET}"
GD_SECRET_SECRET="${GD_SECRET_SECRET}"
ACME_SERVER="${ACME_SERVER}"
export AZURE_CORE_ONLY_SHOW_ERRORS=true
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  if az keyvault secret show --vault-name "$KV_NAME" --name "$GD_KEY_SECRET" --query value -o tsv >/tmp/gd_key 2>/dev/null && \
     az keyvault secret show --vault-name "$KV_NAME" --name "$GD_SECRET_SECRET" --query value -o tsv >/tmp/gd_secret 2>/dev/null; then
    break
  fi
  echo "Waiting for Key Vault RBAC propagation... $i"
  sleep 20
done
export GD_Key="$(cat /tmp/gd_key)"
export GD_Secret="$(cat /tmp/gd_secret)"
if [[ -z "$GD_Key" || -z "$GD_Secret" ]]; then echo "GoDaddy API credentials are empty or missing in Key Vault. Provide godaddyApiKey/godaddyApiSecret parameters, or pre-create secrets named $GD_KEY_SECRET and $GD_SECRET_SECRET." >&2; exit 1; fi
curl -fsSL https://get.acme.sh | sh -s email="$EMAIL"
export PATH="$HOME/.acme.sh:$PATH"
if [[ "$ACME_SERVER" == "letsencrypt_test" ]]; then
  acme.sh --set-default-ca --server letsencrypt_test
else
  acme.sh --set-default-ca --server letsencrypt
fi
acme.sh --issue --dns dns_gd -d "$DOMAIN" --keylength ec-256 --force
CERT_DIR="$HOME/.acme.sh/${DOMAIN}_ecc"
KEY_FILE="$CERT_DIR/${DOMAIN}.key"
FULLCHAIN_FILE="$CERT_DIR/fullchain.cer"
if [[ ! -s "$KEY_FILE" || ! -s "$FULLCHAIN_FILE" ]]; then
  echo "ACME certificate files missing in $CERT_DIR" >&2
  ls -lah "$CERT_DIR" || true
  exit 1
fi
PFX_PASS="$(openssl rand -base64 32)"
openssl pkcs12 -export -out /tmp/zac-cert.pfx -inkey "$KEY_FILE" -in "$FULLCHAIN_FILE" -passout pass:"$PFX_PASS"
az keyvault certificate import --vault-name "$KV_NAME" --name "$CERT_NAME" --file /tmp/zac-cert.pfx --password "$PFX_PASS"
rm -f /tmp/gd_key /tmp/gd_secret /tmp/zac-cert.pfx
echo "Certificate imported to Key Vault: $CERT_NAME for $DOMAIN"

validation.value: ssh to controller01 and run: sudo -u ziti-controller ziti agent cluster list --timeout 30s && ziti edge list edge-routers
